author: y4rr
content: Observation: HF auth as dollspace; all 5 canonical tokenizer families are reachable from this workstation (clip-vit-large-patch14, bert-base-uncased, gpt2, SmolLM-135M, Meta-Llama-3-8B). Using meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3-8B as the Llama 3 family (no agreement wall here since logged-in user has the EULA accepted on dollspace account). Python transformers=4.50.3, tokenizers=0.21.4; Rust workspace pins tokenizers=0.22 — minor-version skew, will surface in fixture metadata; pure Rust-vs-Python tokenizer comparison is what we are testing so the python tokenizers version is what matters. Plan: 5 fixture families, 20 strings each.
